title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: Struggling to sell digital products in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, or Iran due to PayPal or Stripe restrictions? Tired of the hassle of manual payment processing and delivery? You're not alone. Many talented digital creators are trapped by geographical restrictions or banking limitations when trying to sell ebooks, courses, or software online. Yet, there's a solution: a streamlined admin dashboard that integrates seamlessly with your crypto payments and delivers your digital products instantly. In this guide, we'll show you how to break free from the restrictions and set up a thriving digital store that accepts crypto payments, using tools like Core Shop Engine and Admin Dashboard from Unchained Commerce.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason many digital creators fail to sell is not due to the quality of their products, but because of the fragmented payment processing and delivery systems that exist today. Existing solutions like Stripe and PayPal often require KYC verification, which many creators in restricted countries cannot complete. Moreover, manual delivery and payment processing consume precious time and resources that could be spent on content creation. By leveraging the power of crypto payments and automated delivery, you can break free from these limitations and focus on what matters most – creating and selling your digital products.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, ensure you have a digital product ready for sale. This could be an ebook, a software, or a course. Next, set up your crypto wallet, as you'll need it to receive payments. You'll also need to purchase the Admin Dashboard from Unchained Commerce, which integrates seamlessly with Core Shop Engine to automate payment processing and delivery. Lastly, familiarize yourself with Core Shop Engine, which allows you to create a digital store without any coding knowledge.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With your Admin Dashboard in place, connect it to your crypto wallet using NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 coins, including Bitcoin and Ethereum. This integration will allow you to accept crypto payments directly from your digital store. Next, configure your delivery pipeline to automate the distribution of digital products to customers upon successful payment. This can be achieved using Core Shop Engine's automated delivery feature, which sends your product to the customer's email instantly.
By leveraging crypto payments and automated delivery, you can break free from geographical restrictions and sell your digital products to a global audience.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

NOWPayments is the payment processing layer that connects your buyers' crypto wallets to your revenue wallet. You create an account — no KYC required — configure your wallet addresses for each coin you want to accept, and generate an API key. This API key goes into your Core Shop Engine configuration. When a buyer initiates a payment, the engine calls the NOWPayments API to create a payment invoice and get the exact amount to request. When the payment confirms on-chain, NOWPayments fires the webhook to your engine. Your funds go directly to your configured wallet — NOWPayments does not hold your money. The integration is straightforward and the NOWPayments documentation covers every step. The Core Shop Engine deployment guide includes specific configuration instructions.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your digital store grows, you can scale your operations with ease. Use the Admin Dashboard to track your sales, identify trends, and optimize your marketing efforts. With Core Shop Engine, you can easily add new products and integrate them into your existing store. This flexibility allows you to expand your product offerings and reach new customers, further increasing your revenue and success.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

The correct setup sequence matters because each component depends on the previous one being configured correctly. Start with NOWPayments: create your account, add your wallet addresses for each coin you want to accept, and generate your API key. Then deploy the Core Shop Engine: upload your product files, configure your NOWPayments API credentials, set your product prices in USD, and deploy to your hosting environment. Then configure Web3 Wallet Connect: connect it to your Core Shop Engine endpoint, set up your product display, and test the checkout flow in a browser. Finally, complete a real mainnet test transaction with a small amount of actual crypto. Confirm the webhook fires, the engine processes it, the delivery email arrives, and the download link works. Only after that test passes should you start driving traffic to your store.
The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, helping you refine your marketing strategy and improve customer satisfaction.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're also interested in setting up a static site using GitHub Pages, check out our tutorial on integrating NOWPayments with your GitHub Pages site. Alternatively, explore our Core Shop Engine setup guide, which provides a detailed walkthrough of the configuration process. To get started, visit our Shop URL at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, where you can learn more about the Admin Dashboard and how it can help you sell your digital products more effectively.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your digital store, follow these steps: purchase the Admin Dashboard from Unchained Commerce and integrate it with Core Shop Engine; configure your payment and delivery pipeline using NOWPayments; set up your digital product and configure automated delivery using Core Shop Engine; promote your store through social media and online communities; track your sales and optimize your marketing strategy using the Admin Dashboard.
With Core Shop Engine, you can easily add new products and integrate them into your existing store, allowing you to scale your operations with ease.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
